ORDER ON ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF MANDAMUS

PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION FILED BY PETITIONER TYMA, WILLIAM JOSEPH AS TO RESPONDENT DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF MANDAMUS AND/OR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET PER COURT ORDER BY JUDGE ROBERTSON HEARING SET FOR MAY-02-2002 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF MANDAMUS AND/OR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, ARGUED, PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE DMV HAS JURISDICTION TO REVOKE PETITIONER'S LICENSE. HOWEVER, THE COURT ALSO FINDS THE DMV'S FINDINGS OF FACT ERRONEOUS AS THEY STATE THAT PETITIONER WAS ARRESTED FOR VIOLATIONS OF THE CALIFORNIA VEHICLE CODE, WHEN THE RECORDS CLEARLY INDICATES THAT HE WAS ARRESTED FOR VIOLATION OF THE FEDERAL CODE OF REGULATIONS. THE COURT REMANDS THE MATTER TO THE DMV TO CLARIFY ITS FINDINGS OF FACT BASED UPON THE EXISTING ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD. PETITIONER TO PREP ORDER. REPORTER: JUDITH N. THOMSEN, CSR# 5591
